exercises.name: Barbell Back Squat
exercises.instruction: Brace core. Break at hips and knees simultaneously. Aim for parallel or below.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.instruction: Hinge at hips with soft knees. Feel the stretch in hamstrings. Keep bar close to legs.

exercises.name: Walking Lunges
exercises.instruction: Each leg. Keep torso upright. Control the descent.

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.instruction: Feet shoulder width. Do not lock out knees at the top.

exercises.name: Leg Curl
exercises.instruction: Control the negative. Squeeze at the bottom.

exercises.name: Calf Raises
exercises.instruction: Full stretch at the bottom. Pause at the top. Slow and controlled.

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.instruction: Retract scapula. Feet flat on floor. Touch chest on each rep.

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Press
exercises.instruction: 30 degree incline. Control the descent. Full range of motion.

exercises.name: Cable Fly
exercises.instruction: Slight bend in elbows. Squeeze at the top. Control the stretch.

exercises.name: Overhead Press
exercises.instruction: Brace core. Press straight overhead. Avoid excessive back arch.

exercises.name: Lateral Raise
exercises.instruction: Lead with elbows. Slight forward lean. Control the negative.

exercises.name: Tricep Pushdown
exercises.instruction: Keep elbows pinned to sides. Squeeze at full extension.

exercises.name: Overhead Tricep Extension
exercises.instruction: Keep elbows close to head. Full stretch at the bottom.

days.restNote: Active recovery. Light walking or stretching recommended. Focus on hydration and nutrition.

exercises.name: Barbell Row
exercises.instruction: Hinge to 45 degrees. Pull to lower chest. Squeeze shoulder blades together.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.instruction: Wide grip. Pull to upper chest. Control the negative.

exercises.name: Seated Cable Row
exercises.instruction: Close grip. Pull to navel. Keep chest up.

exercises.name: Face Pull
exercises.instruction: Pull to forehead level. Externally rotate at the end. Squeeze rear delts.

exercises.name: Reverse Fly
exercises.instruction: Slight bend in elbows. Squeeze shoulder blades together at the top.

exercises.name: Barbell Curl
exercises.instruction: Keep elbows pinned. Full extension at the bottom. No swinging.

exercises.name: Hammer Curl
exercises.instruction: Neutral grip. Controlled throughout. Squeeze at the top.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Bulgarian Split Squat
exercises.instruction: Each leg. Rear foot elevated. Keep torso upright. Deep stretch at bottom.

exercises.name: Hip Thrust
exercises.instruction: Drive through heels. Squeeze glutes hard at the top. Chin tucked.

exercises.name: Leg Extension
exercises.instruction: Squeeze quads hard at the top. Control the negative.

exercises.name: Seated Leg Curl
exercises.instruction: Full range of motion. Slow eccentric.

exercises.name: Single Leg Calf Raise
exercises.instruction: Full stretch at the bottom. Hold at the top. Each leg.

exercises.name: Tibialis Raise
exercises.instruction: Lean back against wall. Pull toes up. Prehab for shin splints.

days.restNote: Full rest day. Foam rolling and mobility work recommended. Prioritize sleep.

exercises.name: Pull Up
exercises.instruction: Full dead hang at the bottom. Chin over bar. Control the descent.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
exercises.instruction: Seated or standing. Full range of motion. Brace core.

exercises.name: Chest Supported Row
exercises.instruction: Squeeze at the top. Full stretch at the bottom. No momentum.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Chest Fly
exercises.instruction: Slight bend in elbows. Deep stretch. Squeeze at the top.

exercises.name: Straight Arm Pulldown
exercises.instruction: Keep arms straight. Feel the lats. Control throughout.

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Curl
exercises.instruction: Incline bench. Full stretch at the bottom. Supinate at the top.

exercises.name: Skull Crusher
exercises.instruction: Lower to forehead. Keep elbows in. Full extension at top.

exercises.name: Lateral Raise
exercises.instruction: Burnout set. Light weight. Focus on the contraction.

exercises.name: Bent Over Band Pull Aparts
exercises.instruction: Pause 1sec with hands wide on each rep

exercises.name: Drop Lunge to Knee Lift
exercises.instruction: 1-3 inch range

exercises.instruction: Rear foot on 4-6 inch plates
